questions.question: What happens if you write count++ instead of count.value++ when count is a ref(0)?
options: You are incrementing the wrapper object, not the actual value
Vue automatically redirects the operation to .value
A TypeScript error prevents this at compile time

questions.question: Where do you NOT need to write .value to access a ref's data?
What is the result of calling items.push(4) when items = ref([1, 2, 3])?
options: The item is added and the UI updates reactively
TypeError: push is not a function
